hero.title: Tools you can rely on
hero.subtitle: Milling discs, hand tools and power tools for professionals and DIY enthusiasts – all in one place.

categories.title: Our tool categories
categories.subtitle: Choose from a wide range of quality tools and accessories.

milling.name: Milling discs
milling.description: Milling and grinding discs for straight and angle grinders, for precise work on metal, wood and stone.

hand.name: Hand tools
hand.description: Wrenches, screwdrivers, pliers and other hand tools in professional quality for everyday use.

power.name: Power tools
power.description: Drills, grinders, saws and other power tools from trusted brands at great prices.

aboutSection.title: Who we are
aboutSection.text: We are a family business, Maroško s.r.o., selling quality tools for several years. We offer our customers a personal approach, expert advice and reliable service.

testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.subtitle: Reviews from satisfied customers and partners.

review1.name: Peter Novák
review1.text: We've been working with Maroško for years. They always have stock available and help us choose the right tools.

review2.name: Jana Kováčová
review2.text: Friendly service and quality tools at fair prices. My order arrived at home the very next day.

review3.name: Milan Horváth
review3.text: We use Maroško's milling discs every day - they last long and offer consistent quality.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to our customers' most common questions.

q1.question: How quickly do you deliver ordered tools?
q1.answer: In-stock items are shipped within 24 hours, courier delivery usually takes 1-2 business days.

q2.question: Do you supply tools to companies and tradespeople?
q2.answer: Yes, we prepare tailored price offers for business customers and larger orders as well.

q3.question: Can I pick up the tools in person?
q3.answer: Yes, personal pickup is possible by arrangement directly at our premises in Vrádište.

q4.question: Do you provide a warranty and service for the tools you sell?
q4.answer: We provide a statutory warranty on all goods and arrange service or replacement if needed.

contactCta.title: Have a question or interested in an offer?
contactCta.subtitle: Write to us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contactCta.note: Sending the message opens your email client with a pre-filled message to info@marosko.sk.

about.title: About Us
about.content: We are a family business Maroško s.r.o., specializing in tool sales for several years.
